title: Mise binary downloaded without integrity verification (G19)
expected: Mise binary download MUST verify integrity (sha256, signify, Sigstore, or GitHub attestations).
evidence:
ARG TARGETARCH=amd64

FROM golang:1.25-bookworm AS redact-builder

ARG TARGETARCH

WORKDIR /src

ARG GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct
ENV GOPROXY=${GOPROXY}

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY cmd/ ./cmd/
COPY pkg/ ./pkg/
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} \
    go build -trimpath -o /out/redact ./cmd/redact

FROM golang:1.25-bookworm AS agentd-builder

ARG TARGETARCH

WORKDIR /src

ARG GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct
ENV GOPROXY=${GOPROXY}

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download
COPY cmd/ ./cmd/
COPY pkg/ ./pkg/
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=${TARGETARCH} \
    go build -trimpath -o /out/workspace-agentd ./cmd/workspace-agentd

FROM debian:bookworm-slim

ARG TARGETARCH

# Override to use a different release: --build-arg OPENCODE_VERSION=<version>
# Pinned to 1.15.12 (May 2026) — validated against the proxy code in
# api/internal/handlers/proxy.go and session_tracker.go. See worklog 0070
# for the full v1.2.27→v1.15.12 impact analysis (15 items, all non-breaking).
# Key changes: Effect HttpApi replaces Hono, events gain "id" field, responses
# may be gzip-compressed (proxy streams transparently).
ARG OPENCODE_VERSION=1.15.12

ARG MISE_VERSION=2026.5.15

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    bash ca-certificates curl git jq unzip xz-utils \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install opencode from upstream releases.
#
# Source: https://github.com/anomalyco/
notes: Confirmed G19 from threat model. Recommend pinning a sha256 of the mise tarball at build time.
